faq_2_question: Is the app free to use?
faq_3_question: What information do I need to provide when signing up?
faq_4_question: Can I edit my profile later?
faq_5_question: Which devices can I use the app on?
faq_6_question: How does the AI friend work?
faq_7_question: Are my conversations with the AI saved?
faq_8_question: Can I choose the AI character myself?
faq_9_question: Will the AI also suggest real people as matches?
faq_10_question: Can my conversations with the AI be seen by others?
faq_11_question: How can I delete my account?
faq_1_answer: Friendify is an AI-powered friendship app. It makes it easy for users to meet new people while also offering an AI friend they can chat with, ask for advice, or talk to when they feel lonely.
faq_2_answer: You can use the app with its basic features for free. With a premium membership, you can get benefits like additional chat features, unlimited messaging, and access to advanced AI personalities.
faq_3_answer: Your email address, username, and birthdate are basically required. To better personalize your profile, you can add your interests and a short bio if you wish.
faq_4_answer: Yes. You can update your profile photo, bio, and interests anytime from the profile settings.
faq_5_answer: Friendify is available on both iOS and Android devices. A web version will also be live soon.
faq_6_answer: Our AI gives personalized responses based on the information you provide and your conversation style. Chats flow naturally, smoothly, and intimately.
faq_7_answer: Your chats may be stored anonymously to improve user experience. Per our privacy policy, your personal data is not shared with third parties.
faq_8_answer: Yes. If you wish, you can customize the chat experience by setting the AI's name, character traits, or speaking style.
faq_9_answer: Yes. It can suggest suitable user profiles to you based on your interests and chat style.
faq_10_answer: No. AI chats are completely private and are not shared with other users.
faq_11_answer: Under Profile → Account Settings → 'Delete My Account' option.
